description: Digital proximity, ambient light, RGB, and gesture sensor, I2C

Device Control.name: ENABLE
Device Control.description: Enable register used to power the device on/off, enable functions and interrupts.

fields.name: GEN
fields.description: Gesture Enable. When asserted, the gesture state machine can be activated.

fields.name: PIEN
fields.description: Proximity Interrupt Enable. Permits proximity interrupts subject to persistence filter.

fields.name: AIEN
fields.description: ALS Interrupt Enable. Permits ALS interrupts subject to persistence filter.

fields.name: WEN
fields.description: Wait Enable. Activates the wait timer.

fields.name: PEN
fields.description: Proximity Detect Enable. Activates proximity detection.

Device Control.name: STATUS
Device Control.description: The read-only Status Register provides the status of the device.

ALS.name: ATIME
ALS.description: Statistics counter (from manifest, no field details in source)

Proximity.name: PERS
Proximity.description: Persistence Register sets interrupt persistence count for ALS and Proximity.

enum_values.1: Any proximity value outside of threshold range
enum_values.2: 2 consecutive proximity values out of range
enum_values.3: 3 consecutive proximity values out of range
enum_values.15: 15 consecutive proximity values out of range

enum_values.1: Any ALS value outside of threshold range
enum_values.15: 60 consecutive ALS values out of range

fields.name: WLONG
fields.description: Wait Long. When asserted, the wait cycle is increased by a factor 12x from that programmed in the WTIME register.

Proximity.name: CONTROL
Proximity.description: Control register for LED drive strength, proximity gain, ALS and color gain

Proximity.name: CONFIG2
Proximity.description: Enables saturation interrupts for Proximity and Clear channel. LED_BOOST allows LDR pin to sink more current.

fields.name: PSIEN
fields.description: Proximity Saturation Interrupt Enable. 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled

fields.name: CPSIEN
fields.description: Clear Photodiode Saturation Interrupt Enable. 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled

fields.name: LED_BOOST
fields.description: Additional LDR current during proximity and gesture LED pulses. Current value, set by LDRIVE, is increased by the percentage of LED_BOOST.

fields.name: RESERVED_0
fields.description: Reserved. Write as 1. Set high by default during POR.

Proximity.name: CONFIG3
Proximity.description: Configuration Three Register used to select photodiodes for proximity and configure masks.

fields.name: PMASK_U
fields.description: Proximity Mask UP Enable. Writing a 1 disables this photodiode.

fields.name: PMASK_D
fields.description: Proximity Mask DOWN Enable. Writing a 1 disables this photodiode.

fields.name: PMASK_L
fields.description: Proximity Mask LEFT Enable. Writing a 1 disables this photodiode.

fields.name: PMASK_R
fields.description: Proximity Mask RIGHT Enable. Writing a 1 disables this photodiode.

Gesture.name: GCONF2
Gesture.description: Gesture Configuration Two register contains settings for wait time, LDR drive current strength and Gesture gain control.

fields.name: GGAIN
fields.description: Gesture Gain Control. Sets the gain of the proximity receiver in gesture mode.

fields.name: GLDRIVE
fields.description: Gesture LED Drive Strength. Sets LED Drive Strength in gesture mode.

fields.name: GWTIME
fields.description: Gesture Wait Time. Controls the amount of time in a low power mode between gesture detection cycles.

Gesture.name: GCONF3
Gesture.description: Gesture Configuration Three Register. Controls which gesture photodiode pairs are enabled.

Gesture.name: GCONF4
Gesture.description: Gesture Configuration Four Register. Controls gesture interrupts, mode, and status.

fields.name: GMODE
fields.description: Gesture Mode. 1=Gesture active, 0=ALS/Prox/Color. Write 1 to enter, 0 to exit.

Gesture.name: GSTATUS
Gesture.description: Gesture Status Register indicates the operational condition of the gesture state machine.

fields.name: GFOV
fields.description: Gesture FIFO Overflow. 1 indicates FIFO filled to capacity and new data lost.

fields.name: GVALID
fields.description: Gesture FIFO Data. Set when GFLVL > GFIFOTH. Reset when GMODE=0 and GFLVL=0.

Interrupts.name: IFORCE
Interrupts.description: Interrupt force register. Forces an interrupt (any value).
